# agentic-kanban

> Agent coordination engine — shared task state for cooperating agents. One SQLite file. Zero infrastructure. No servers, no daemons, no queues.

SQLite-backed task coordination for AI agents. Agents claim work atomically, report progress, survive crashes, and hand off reviews without anything in the middle. Concurrency tested up to 50 agents.

## Install

- [Install script](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrSamDev/agentic-kanban/main/install.sh): `curl -sfL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrSamDev/agentic-kanban/main/install.sh | sh`
- [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/mrSamDev/agentic-kanban/releases): Pinned versions for CI/CD

## Docs

- [Landing page](https://mrsamdev.github.io/agentic-kanban/): Full documentation with workflow, command reference, and skill hierarchy

## Source

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/mrSamDev/agentic-kanban): Go source, issues, discussions

## Optional

- [Skill: dispatch-task](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrSamDev/agentic-kanban/main/docs/llms-full.txt): Create a new task in the kanban board
- [Skill: claim-next-task](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrSamDev/agentic-kanban/main/docs/llms-full.txt): Claim the highest-priority unclaimed task
- [Skill: create-plan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrSamDev/agentic-kanban/main/docs/llms-full.txt): 3-pass extraction from a plan file
- [Skill: approve-plan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrSamDev/agentic-kanban/main/docs/llms-full.txt): Dispatch approved tasks from proposal to board
- [Skill: complete-task](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrSamDev/agentic-kanban/main/docs/llms-full.txt): Mark a task as done or submit for review
- [Skill: log-progress](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrSamDev/agentic-kanban/main/docs/llms-full.txt): Log progress and renew lease on a claimed task
- [Skill: block-task](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrSamDev/agentic-kanban/main/docs/llms-full.txt): Mark a task as blocked with explanation
- [Skill: review-backlog](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrSamDev/agentic-kanban/main/docs/llms-full.txt): Search tasks by filters
- [Skill: view-task](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrSamDev/agentic-kanban/main/docs/llms-full.txt): View task details, notes, and history
- [Skill: claim-task](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrSamDev/agentic-kanban/main/docs/llms-full.txt): Claim a specific task by ID
- [Skill: setup-hooks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrSamDev/agentic-kanban/main/docs/llms-full.txt): Set up event hooks for notifications and automation
- [Skill: claim-review](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrSamDev/agentic-kanban/main/docs/llms-full.txt): Claim next reviewer task
- [Skill: approve-task](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrSamDev/agentic-kanban/main/docs/llms-full.txt): Approve a task in review
- [Skill: reject-task](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrSamDev/agentic-kanban/main/docs/llms-full.txt): Reject a task in review, send back to TODO
